title: Omnitrix Start Kit ( Alien Evolution )
description: This project adds the legendary Prototype Omnitrix directly into the Bonus Chest. Start your alien adventure from the very first second—just spawn in, grab your watch, and transform!
body:
**🟢 About the Project**

This project adds the legendary Prototype Omnitrix from the Alien Evolution mod directly into the Minecraft Bonus Chest. Tired of searching for rare structures or waiting for meteors? With this datapack, you can begin your alien adventure from the very first second of gameplay. Just spawn in, open your starter kit, and it's Hero Time!

**✨ Key Features**

* **⌚ Instant Omnitrix:** Get the Prototype watch immediately upon spawning.
* **🚀 Fast Start:** Skip the grind and start transforming right away.
* **🛠️ Mod Compatibility:** Specifically designed for the Alien Evolution (Ben 10) mod.
* **📂 Plug & Play:** Simply drop the file into your world's datapacks folder.

**📖 How to Use**

1. Place the datapack file in your world's datapacks folder before creating or loading the world.
2. Ensure that the "Bonus Chest" option is enabled in your Minecraft world creation settings.
3. Open the chest at your spawn point and claim your destiny!

**🛠️ Required Mods**

To use this datapack, you must have the following mod installed:
* **[Alien Evolution](https://modrinth.com/mod/alienevo):** This datapack is a dedicated addon for the Alien Evolution mod. It will not function without it.
